summary: Deleted the repo-root target_funcs.txt tracking file after all listed src/melee/gr/granime.c grAnime targets were marked complete; the decomp.dev GALE01 report showed no output changes.
what_changed: Deleted target_funcs.txt, removing 10 lines from the repository root.
Removed a checklist headed `File: src/melee/gr/granime.c` and `Funcs:`.

The deleted checklist contained eight completed `[x]` grAnime symbols: grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, and grAnime_801C7C1C.
No source or assembly files were changed in this PR.
The only issue comment was the decomp-dev bot report for GALE01, which said `No changes`.
smart_moves: The target list entries were all checked off, so deleting the file avoided leaving stale completed target metadata in the repo.
The PR kept the cleanup isolated to target_funcs.txt, making review and binary-output verification straightforward.
The GALE01 `No changes` bot report provided evidence that this bookkeeping cleanup did not affect generated game output.
decomp_lessons: Use target function lists as short-lived coordination files; once every listed symbol is complete, remove or refresh the list instead of keeping obsolete targets.
Bookkeeping-only PRs should still be checked against the project’s no-regression tooling, especially when they touch decomp progress tracking.
When deleting a tracking file, preserving the removed symbol names in PR history keeps completed target context searchable later.
naming_conventions: The grAnime symbols in this target list follow the module-prefix-plus-address style, e.g. `grAnime_801C86D4`.
The deleted target list used a simple checklist format: `File: <source path>`, `Funcs:`, then markdown checkbox entries like `- [x] <symbol>`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactic was introduced; this was metadata cleanup only.
The relevant validation tactic was confirming the decomp.dev GALE01 report stayed at `No changes` after deleting the target list.
review_feedback: No human review comments or review records were present in the slice.
decomp-dev bot reported: `Report for GALE01 (09511e2 - bcc3bf5): No changes`.
follow_up_queries: Find earlier PRs that completed the listed grAnime functions before target_funcs.txt was removed.
Search for later reintroductions or replacements of target_funcs.txt to understand current target-tracking practice.
Inspect src/melee/gr/granime.c history around the eight grAnime_801Cxxxx symbols for the matching work that made this cleanup possible.
